message: Updated addendum docs and runnable examples to use explicit message-write policy grants, and refreshed docs smoke for current IPC pipe security.

Verified addendum docs and runnable message-sending examples use explicit message-write policies; docs no longer claim default policy grants message-write. Scoped builds, PluginAdapterDocumentationTests, and docs/example smoke passed, including AddendumExampleRunner and local plugin execution.
command: dotnet build examples/Addendum/SafeIR.AddendumExamples/SafeIR.AddendumExamples.csproj -c Release; dotnet build examples/LocalPlugin/SafeIR.PluginLocal/SafeIR.PluginLocal.csproj -c Release; dotnet build examples/PluginIpc/SafeIR.PluginIpc.Server/SafeIR.PluginIpc.Server.csproj -c Release; dotnet build examples/PluginIpc/SafeIR.PluginIpc.Client/SafeIR.PluginIpc.Client.csproj -c Release; dotnet test tests/SafeIR.Tests/SafeIR.Tests.csproj -c Release --filter FullyQualifiedName~PluginAdapterDocumentationTests; ./scripts/check-docs-smoke.ps1 -Configuration Release
